title: CPMForge Platform Snapshot
description: Singleton snapshot per host instance (uips-desktop or vscode). machine.id is the shared fingerprint used for license validation. extensions[] enumerates all installed CPMForge extensions (publisher: cpmforge) and their license state.

host.description: uips-desktop = UiPath Studio 26.x+; vscode = plain VS Code

id.description: Consensus machine UUID — shared fingerprint used for license activation across all CPMForge extensions in this host.

id_sources.description: Raw UUID values from each identity source. null if source was unreachable.

registry.description: HKLM registry state for machine identity.

orchestrator_license.description: UiPath Orchestrator license — shared across all extensions. Required when host=uips-desktop. available=false means Orchestrator unreachable — all extensions operate in crippled mode.

current_user.description: Current Orchestrator user — from GET /odata/Users/UiPath.Server.Configuration.OData.GetCurrentUser. Used as informational metadata on machine activation; not the primary enforcement mechanism.

key.description: UiPath user GUID (Key field) — primary identifier, stable under SSO

directory_identifier.description: IdP-assigned identifier (e.g. Azure AD object ID) — most stable under SSO. Null for manually provisioned users.

tenant_key.description: Tenant GUID — scope qualifier for key uniqueness

username.description: Display only — fragile, changes under SSO or user rename

id.description: Orchestrator DB row ID — informational only, tenant-local, fragile across migrations

extensions.description: All installed CPMForge extensions (publisher: cpmforge) in this host instance. Discovered at runtime via vscode.extensions.all filtered by publisher prefix.

id.description: Fully qualified extension id, e.g. cpmforge.cpmf-uisor

version.description: Extension semver. Versions < 0.5.0 use per-extension license policy (pre-v0.5 tier).

license.description: License state for this extension. Absent if validation not yet attempted.

source.description: api = validated against Keygen API; file = validated from local .lic certificate (airgapped)

entitlements.description: Entitlement codes active for this license. Extension gates features against this list.
